description_long: This is a tall, narrow ladder constructed primarily from wood, featuring two long side rails and evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The ladder has a simple, utilitarian design with no visible embellishments or safety features. The rungs are rectangular and appear to be securely fixed between the side rails, providing stable footholds for climbing. The wood has a natural finish, with a light tan color on the rungs and a slightly darker hue on the side rails. The ladder is straight and does not fold or articulate, indicating it is intended for leaning against a surface. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for reaching moderate heights, such as those found in urban maintenance or residential settings.
description: A tall, straight wooden ladder with evenly spaced rectangular rungs and natural wood finish, designed for leaning use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all rungs and both side rails, highlighting the ladder's full height and climbing surface.
description_view_1: Side view showing the ladder as a thin vertical line, with only the edge of the side rail visible and no rungs apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying all rungs and both side rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing only the thin edge of the ladder with no rungs visible.
